h1.visual_description: Large, serif font, left-aligned, preceded by a numerical section identifier.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, same size as body text, run-in with the paragraph (inline), followed by a period.

visual_matchers.pattern: Image with right-aligned text wrapping and a caption below starting with 'Figure X.X:'
Text enclosed in parentheses containing a name and a year

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (not explicitly shown, but standard for academic serif layouts)

layout_info.primary_flow: single-column with occasional text wrapping around right-aligned images
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer contains 'Chapter Title | Page Number' aligned to the bottom right (e.g., 'Gender and Fishing | 155')
